title: Different models of media effects
summary: 9699 — hypodermic syringe, two-step flow, uses and gratifications, and cultural effects models.
learningObjectives: Outline hypodermic syringe and direct effects models.
Explain two-step flow and opinion leaders.
Evaluate cultural effects and moral panic theories.

simpleExplanation.title: Does media control us?
simpleExplanation.summary: Early models saw media as all-powerful; later research emphasises audience activity, interpretation, and gradual cultural influence.

sections.content: **Media effects** (10.2) — chronology helps: **direct → limited → active audience**.
